ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* Unique ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region the country belongs to */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group classification of the country */,
  "lending_category" TEXT /* Lending category of the country */,
  "other_groups" TEXT /* Additional groups or classifications of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp_nominal" REAL /* Nominal GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the indicator value */,
  "indicator_category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., economic, social, environmental) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_indicators" (
  "ci_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-indicator-year combination */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for the given country and year */,
  "value_lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for the indicator value */,
  "value_upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for the indicator value */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the country-indicator-year combination */,
  "data_note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ci_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_indicators_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Secure password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "ci_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country-indicator-year combination being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device, etc.) used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ci_id FOREIGN KEY ("ci_id") REFERENCES country_indicators ("ci_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
